name: bm26-titanic-dmx
description: BM26 Titanic — DMX universe/fixture handler and Art-Net output layer

scripts.test: node -e "const { DmxHandler } = require('.'); const h = new DmxHandler(); h.load(); const u = h.universe('main'); const f = u.fixture('bar_1'); f.setPixel(1, 255, 128, 0); const ok = u.buffer[0] === 255 && u.buffer[1] === 128 && u.buffer[2] === 0; console.log(ok ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL', 'buffer:', u.buffer[0], u.buffer[1], u.buffer[2]);"
